reviews.comment:
Olvidable. Los baños un asco, náuseas literal. El local mini y sin opciones. Nunca más. El ACA cada vez peor.

(Translated by Google)
Forgettable. The bathrooms were disgusting, literally nauseating. The place was tiny and had no options. Never again. The ACA is getting worse and worse.

reviews.comment:
Un lindo lugar para bajar a estirar los pies, completo: podes cargar combustible, comprar bebidas o lo q gustes en el shop, o estacionar en la arboleda para descansar o almorzar. Los baños son muy amplios, limpios. Está al lado de la Capilla❤️

(Translated by Google)
A lovely place to stop and stretch your legs, with everything you need: you can fill up with gas, buy drinks or whatever you like at the shop, or park in the grove to rest or have lunch. The restrooms are very spacious and clean. It's right next to the Chapel ❤️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxXzVMS2tRRRAB
